headline: Crypto's Stablecoin Surge Revives November 2021 Anxiety
narrative: Stablecoin growth and ETF inflows, reminiscent of November 2021, fuel market anxiety as Bitcoin hovers around $76k, despite a bullish 30-day momentum.

headline: Data gap - Unknown phase tracking
narrative: Data incomplete: BTC price not available this sweep. Phase tracking: Unknown. Pattern similarity to top_2021_nov: 65%.

headline: BTC in Holding Pattern
narrative: BTC hovers around $78k, reminiscent of November 2021's sideways regime, as market participants digest recent regulatory news and await clearer macroeconomic signals.

headline: Bearish Momentum Resurfaces
narrative: Waning BTC momentum and stablecoin growth, reminiscent of November 2021's bearish turn, fuel fears as ETF outflows intensify, signaling a risk-off regime.

headline: Anxiety conditions detected
narrative: Current phase: Anxiety. Pattern match 64% to top_2021_nov. Analysis pending.

headline: Bitcoin Holds Steady: Will History Repeat?
narrative: Amidst a tense Fear & Greed score of 33, Bitcoin hovers around $77K in a sideways regime reminiscent of November 2021's consolidation phase.

headline: Bitcoin Stuck in Holding Pattern
narrative: Markets in sideways regime, mirroring November 2021's consolidation. Moderate fear suggests traders are cautious but not panicked.
